cards.duringText: Your opponent may remove any number of lie tokens. Decrease the value of this card by 1 for each lie token removed.
cards.title: No Strings Attached

cards.afterText: If no tokens were removed,  the opponent must discard a random card from their hand.
cards.duringText: Remove all of Pinocchio's Lie tokens. Add 2 to the value of this card for each lie token removed in this way.
cards.title: cri-cri-cri

cards.afterText: If this card was switched in as a result of Pinocchio's ability, deal 2 damage to the opposing fighter.
cards.title: a bit on the nose

cards.afterText:
---> ...And Varnish

...AND VARNISH 3: AFTER COMBAT: If this card was switched in as a result of Pinocchio's ability, recover 1 health.
cards.title: Blood, Sweat...

cards.duringText: Your opponent may remove any number of lie tokens. Decrease the value of this card by 2 for each lie token removed.
cards.title: Heartwood

cards.afterText: Draw a card for each Lie token in play. Then, your opponent may remove Lie tokens. For each Lie token removed place one of the cards on the BOTTOM of your deck.
cards.title: Never learns

cards.duringText: This card's value is -1 per Lie token in play.
cards.immediateText: Cancel all effects on your opponent's card.
cards.title: Just a Marionette and a Bug

cards.basicText:
Remove all your Lie tokens. On your NEXT turn, your attacks are +1 for each Lie token removed. (set this card to the side as a reminder)
This ends your turn if not played as your last action.
cards.title: I'm a Real Boy!

cards.duringText: If this card was switched in as a result of Pinocchio's ability, it's value is 5 instead.
cards.title: The Real Mr. Pointy

cards.duringText: Your opponent discards 1 random card. Add its BOOST value to this card's attack value. If your opponent removes a lie token, you must also discard a random card and add its BOOST value to their card.
cards.title: Lies can easily be recognized

cards.afterText: Move your hero up to 4 spaces. Your opponent may remove a Lie token to cancel the effects on this card.
cards.title: High Strung

cards.basicText: Remove 1 lie token. If you are then TRUTHFUL, recover 3 health. Otherwise recover 1 health
cards.title: Make Amends Pinocchio!

hero.name: Pinocchio
hero.specialAbility:
FIBROUS FIBBER
Once per turn, if the opponent defended,  Pinocchio may switch his declared attack card with another from his hand after revealing. If he does so, he gains a Lie token. If he is at max lie tokens, he cannot use his ability.

ruleCards.content:
Lie tokens allow for benefits for the opposing player based on how many there are. There is a maximum of 3 Lie tokens that can be in play at any one time.

Place the face token down at the start of your game. Whenever a Lie token is to be placed, add a length of nose to the face. Each section of nose is a Lie token.

When he has no Lie Tokens, Pinocchio is TRUTHFUL.
ruleCards.title: Lie Tokens

name: Pinocchio
note: Pinocchio is all about balancing the lie tokens. You want to benefit from his ability while spending the tokens before your opponent does. He can be crippled by opponent spending so play those cards that allow your opponent to spend the tokens wisely when you are tokenless. However, simply remaining tokenless won't merit you some bigger attacks.
